heading: Research & Development Core
title: AI/ML Researcher
shortDesc: Advance foundational and applied research in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.
longDesc: As an AI/ML Research Engineer at NFRAC, you will work on deep learning models, optimization techniques, and next-generation intelligent systems that power internal and external ecosystem tools.
responsibilities: Research and develop novel machine learning architectures.
Work on model optimization and large-scale training pipelines.
Collaborate on AI-driven internal systems and frameworks.

heading: Research & Development Core
title: Cyber Security Researcher
shortDesc: Research advanced cybersecurity systems, threat detection, and secure architectures.
longDesc: You will focus on vulnerability research, encryption systems, threat modeling, and designing secure infrastructures for distributed systems across NFRAC divisions.
responsibilities: Research system vulnerabilities and attack vectors.
Design secure authentication and encryption frameworks.
Build threat detection and prevention models.

heading: Research & Development Core
title: Compiler Researcher
shortDesc: Work on compiler design, optimization, and language processing systems.
longDesc: This role focuses on designing modern compilers, intermediate representations, and optimization techniques for custom languages and high-performance systems like Garuda and internal tooling.
responsibilities: Design compiler pipelines and IR structures.
Implement optimization and code generation techniques.
Research language design and execution models.

heading: Research & Development Core
title: Algorithms Researcher
shortDesc: Research advanced algorithms for optimization, graphs, and system efficiency.
longDesc: You will explore new algorithmic paradigms, complexity reduction techniques, and real-world optimization problems for scalable systems and distributed computing.
responsibilities: Optimize computational efficiency for large-scale systems.
Work on graph theory, optimization, and complexity problems.
